docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $12,500.00 FILED BY HUDSON, AMY AS TO DEFENDANT BROWN, TIMOTHY A VERTEX PROPERTY GROUP ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-04-2026 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-04-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-04-2026 BY VISITING JUDGE JOSEPH HURLEY. PLAINTIFF AMY HUDSON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT TIMOTHY A BROWN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT VERTEX PROPERTY GROUP IS PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. DEFENDANTS TIMOTHY A BROWN AND VERTEX PROPERTY GROUP WAIVE SERVICE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT/NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOSEPH HURLEY; CLERK: N.WEBB. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-04-2026 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HUDSON, AMY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BROWN, TIMOTHY A VERTEX PROPERTY GROUP $3,400.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,475.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
